problem.title: Group Anagrams
problem.description: Given an array of strings strs, group the anagrams together. You can return the answer in any order.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – HashMap
solutions.description: Sort the characters of each string to produce a canonical key shared by all its anagrams, then group strings by that key in a hash map. Anagrams always produce the same sorted character sequence, so this key uniquely identifies each equivalence class. Returning the map's values directly gives all groups in O(n * k log k) time where k is the maximum string length.
